name: PILGRIMS PRIDE CORP
summary: Pilgrim's Pride Corporation is a vertically integrated producer, processor, marketer, and distributor of fresh, frozen, and value-added chicken and pork products. Operating across the U.S., U.K., continental Europe, and Mexico, the company serves foodservice operators, retailers, and export markets. It maintains approximately 4,500 growers, 36 feed mills, 50 hatcheries, 39 processing plants, and 28 prepared foods cook plants. JBS S.A. beneficially owns 82.28% of outstanding common stock.

products.name: Fresh Chicken Products
products.description: Refrigerated whole or cut-up chicken, frozen whole chickens, breast fillets, mini breast fillets, and prepackaged case-ready chicken.

products.name: Prepared Foods
products.description: Portion-controlled breast fillets, tenderloins, nuggets, patties, bacon, sausages, pulled pork, and coated foods sold refrigerated or frozen.

products.name: Fresh Pork and Lamb Products
products.description: Primary pork cuts, added value pork, pork ribs, and lamb products primarily sold in the U.K.

products.name: Export Products
products.description: Whole chickens and chicken parts, primary pork cuts, hog heads and trotters frozen for international distribution.

products.name: Fresh Chicken Products
products.description: Refrigerated whole or cut-up chicken, frozen whole chickens, breast fillets, and prepackaged case-ready chicken.

products.name: Prepared Foods
products.description: Portion-controlled fillets, nuggets, patties, sausages, bacon, smoked meats, coated foods, and deli products sold refrigerated or frozen.

products.name: Fresh Pork and Lamb Products
products.description: Primary pork cuts, added value pork, pork ribs, and lamb products sold in the U.K.

products.name: Export Products
products.description: Whole chickens and chicken parts sold frozen for international distribution; pork cuts and hog heads exported from the U.K.
